panels.title: Backup Last Status
panels.description: Last backup status per cluster (0=Success, 1=Failed, 2=In-Progress)

panels.title: Time Since Last Successful Backup
panels.description: Elapsed time since the last successful backup per cluster

panels.title: Restore Duration p99/p50
panels.description: Restore operation duration percentiles

panels.title: Backup Retention Deleted
panels.description: Number of backups deleted by retention policy over time

panels.title: Backup Job Status
panels.description: Kubernetes backup Job status per job and operation (0=pending, 1=running, 2=succeeded, 3=failed)

panels.title: Monitoring Disabled Access (24h)
panels.description: Number of times monitoring endpoints were accessed while monitoring was disabled

panels.title: Certificate Rotation Rate
panels.description: Rate of certificate rotation events by component, source, and result

panels.title: Certificate Expiry
panels.description: Seconds until certificate expires per component. Red below 7 days, yellow below 30 days.

panels.title: Vault Operations Rate
panels.description: Rate of Vault operations (auth, read, write) by result

panels.title: Vault Operation Duration
panels.description: Vault operation latency percentiles (p50, p99)

panels.title: Webhook Admissions Rate
panels.description: Rate of admission webhook decisions by webhook type, operation, and result

panels.title: Webhook Denied (1h)
panels.description: Webhook admission requests denied in the last hour

panels.title: Webhook Errors (1h)
panels.description: Webhook admission errors in the last hour

panels.title: Upgrade Operations
panels.description: Rate of cluster upgrade operations by result (started, completed, rollback, failed)

panels.title: Rolling Restarts
panels.description: Rate of rolling restart operations by result (started, completed, failed)

panels.title: Recovery Operations
panels.description: Rate of recovery operations by type (incremental, full, differential) and result

panels.title: Upgrades Failed (1h)
panels.description: Failed upgrade operations in the last hour

panels.title: Upgrade Rollbacks (1h)
panels.description: Upgrade rollback operations in the last hour

panels.title: Rolling Restarts Failed (1h)
panels.description: Failed rolling restart operations in the last hour

panels.title: Recovery Failed (1h)
panels.description: Failed recovery operations in the last hour

panels.title: Cert Rotation Errors (1h)
panels.description: Certificate rotation errors in the last hour

panels.title: Vault Errors (1h)
panels.description: Vault operation errors in the last hour

panels.title: Backup Health (Scenario 77 — Pre-Backup Checks)
panels.description: Surfaces backup-Job health so pre-backup-check failures (segments-down, long-running txn, S3 unreachable, low disk) are immediately visible. Backup blocked => Job Failed (status=3), backup_last_status=Failed (1) and backup_total{result="failed"} increments.

panels.title: Failed Backup Jobs (current)
panels.description: Number of backup Jobs currently in the Failed state (cloudberry_backup_job_status == 3, operation=backup). A non-zero value indicates a Scenario 77 pre-backup-check block or a failed backup execution.

panels.title: Backups Failed (1h)
panels.description: Backup operations that failed in the last hour (cloudberry_backup_total{result="failed"}). Each Scenario 77 pre-backup-check block increments this counter.

panels.title: Last Backup Status
panels.description: Most recent backup status per cluster (cloudberry_backup_last_status: 0=Success, 1=Failed, 2=In-Progress). Failed means a pre-backup check blocked the backup or the backup itself failed.

panels.title: Last Successful Backup
panels.description: Wall-clock time of the last successful backup per cluster (cloudberry_backup_last_success_timestamp, Unix seconds).

panels.title: Time Since Last Successful Backup
panels.description: Elapsed time since the last successful backup per cluster (time() - cloudberry_backup_last_success_timestamp). Grows while pre-backup checks keep blocking backups.

panels.title: Backup Job Status Over Time
panels.description: Per-Job backup status timeline (cloudberry_backup_job_status, operation=backup). Codes: 0=Pending, 1=Running, 2=Succeeded, 3=Failed. A drop to 3 marks a Scenario 77 pre-backup-check block or a failed backup run.

panels.title: Backup Outcomes Rate (success vs failed)
panels.description: Rate of backup outcomes by result (cloudberry_backup_total). Rising failed series indicates recurring Scenario 77 pre-backup-check blocks.
